# iproute_nexthop (Resource)

Manages a nexthop object (ip nexthop).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Nexthop with gateway
resource "iproute_nexthop" "gw" {
  nhid    = 1
  gateway = "10.0.0.1"
  device  = "eth0"
}

# Nexthop with device only
resource "iproute_nexthop" "dev" {
  nhid   = 2
  device = "eth0"
}

# Blackhole nexthop
resource "iproute_nexthop" "blackhole" {
  nhid      = 3
  blackhole = true
}

# IPv6 nexthop
resource "iproute_nexthop" "ipv6" {
  nhid    = 4
  gateway = "fd00::1"
  device  = "eth0"
  family  = "inet6"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `nhid` (Number) Nexthop ID.

### Optional

- `blackhole` (Boolean) Blackhole nexthop.
- `device` (String) Output device.
- `family` (String) Address family.
- `fdb` (Boolean) FDB nexthop.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway IP.
- `group` (Attributes List) Nexthop group members. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--group))
- `resilient` (Boolean) Resilient nexthop group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `group`

Required:

- `id` (Number)

Optional:

- `weight` (Number)
